creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:

 diff -urN x11-clocks/wmtime/pkg/DESCR.orig x11-clocks/wmtime/pkg/DESCR

+++ x11-clocks/wmtime/pkg/DESCR Thu Jan 20 13:43:18 2000
@@ -3,3 +3,5 @@
 
 - Rich

+WWW: http://windowmaker.mezaway.org/dockapps/wmtime.html
